narrative:
Burlington Township (precinct in Licking County) has 930 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
